nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.note: V2-compliant webhook trigger. Upgraded from ManualTrigger 2026-04-01. Webhook not active until n8n restart.

parameters.jsCode:
const items=$input.all();let orig=null;let sumResp=null;for(const item of items){if(item.json&&item.json.article_extract!==undefined)orig=item.json;if(item.json&&item.json.content&&Array.isArray(item.json.content))sumResp=item.json;}const sumText=(sumResp&&sumResp.content&&sumResp.content[0])?sumResp.content[0].text:'(no summary)';const extract=(orig&&orig.article_extract)||'';const title=(orig&&orig.article_title)||'';const critPrompt='You wrote this summary of a Wikipedia article. Critically evaluate it.

Original (excerpt):
'+extract+'

Your summary:
'+sumText+'

Return ONLY valid JSON (no other text): {"accuracy":<1-5>,"completeness":<1-5>,"missed_fact":"<key fact missed or null>","verdict":"<good|needs_revision>","improvement":"<one suggestion or null>"}';const crit={model:'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',max_tokens:250,messages:[{role:'user',content:critPrompt}]};return [{json:{crit_body:JSON.stringify(crit),article_title:title,article_extract:extract,article_url:(orig&&orig.article_url)||'',summary_text:sumText}}];

const items=$input.all();let critData=null;let critResp=null;for(const item of items){if(item.json&&item.json.summary_text!==undefined)critData=item.json;if(item.json&&item.json.content&&Array.isArray(item.json.content))critResp=item.json;}const raw=(critResp&&critResp.content&&critResp.content[0])?critResp.content[0].text:'{}';let parsed={accuracy:3,completeness:3,missed_fact:null,verdict:'unknown',improvement:null};try{const s=raw.indexOf('{');const e=raw.lastIndexOf('}');if(s>=0&&e>s)parsed=JSON.parse(raw.slice(s,e+1));}catch(err){}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const conf=((parsed.accuracy||3)+(parsed.completeness||3))/10.0;const out={agent_name:'haiku_self_critic',experiment_id:'haiku_self_critic_'+today,output_type:'self_reflection_evaluation',content:{article_title:(critData&&critData.article_title)||'',article_url:(critData&&critData.article_url)||'',summary:(critData&&critData.summary_text)||'',self_critique:parsed,pattern:'two_pass_haiku_self_reflection'},confidence:conf,promoted:false,reviewed_by_bill:false};return [{json:{body_json:JSON.stringify(out)}}];
